We work quietly under your brand — from first brief to final handoff.MANAGE · END-TO-ENDFull lifecycle managementOnboarding, design, development, revisions, renewals, and support — we handle the entire journey.EARN · TRANSPARENTRevenue share & referralsEarn on every project you bring us. Transparent referral or revenue-share models built for agency partners.SPEED · GUARANTEEDGuaranteed fast turnaroundStructured delivery timelines so your clients get live, polished work without the usual agency wait.Become a partnerWe build digitalExperiencesThat convert.By fusing cinematic aesthetics with extreme structural performance, we architect platforms designed to dominate your market.The gap and the shift — narrative bridgeThe gapYou're getting visitors. But they're not buying.Most websites look fine on the surface — but they lose people at the moments that matter most. Slow pages, confusing layouts, and no proof that you're trustworthy. "Good enough" is quietly costing you customers.The shiftWe fix that. Design, speed, and SEO — working together.We don't just make your site look good. We build it so pages load fast, your message is crystal clear, and visitors feel confident enough to take action — right when they're ready to buy.Our methodologyHOW WE BUILD EXCELLENCE.From first brief to final launch — every pixel is intentional, every decision is strategic.RESEARCH · DEEPDiscover & DefineWe start by understanding your business, your customers, and what success looks like for you — before touching any design. This means your website is built around how your buyers actually think, not just how it looks.QUALITY · MAXDesign & CraftEvery page is designed to look great and perform — fast load times, smooth interactions, and layouts that guide visitors toward taking action. No pretty-but-slow websites here.RESULTS · LIVELaunch & GrowGoing live is just the beginning. We set up SEO, track what's working, and hand everything over clearly — so your site keeps improving and your results keep growing after launch.Selected client outcomesSELECTEDIMPACTS.Selected builds from our portfolio — each piece of work maps to a service vertical and a measurable outcome. For the full capability map, see Services.PROJECTARCH_MOD 01Gadget360IndiaGadget360View ImpactPROJECTARCH_MOD 02Vikram Gps TrackersGPS TrackerView ImpactCore_Logic 02Vikram Gps TrackersPROJECTARCH_MOD 03ShahCarsShahCarsView ImpactCore_Logic 03CarsPROJECTARCH_MOD 04Shree DesignersShree DesignersView ImpactExplore Full ArchiveFrequently asked questionsAnswersCommon questionsStraight answers about how Web Aura works, pricing, timelines, and SEO—the same topics as our full FAQ.What is Web Aura and who do you work with?Web Aura is a web development and digital systems studio based in Hyderabad, India. We work with startups, growing businesses, and enterprises that need strategy-led websites, automation, and AI-ready digital infrastructure—not just a template dropped online. Our team bridges UX, engineering, and growth so your site supports real business outcomes.What services does Web Aura offer?We organise delivery into eight public verticals on our Services page: digital infrastructure and web (Next.js, SEO, Core Web Vitals, dashboards), revenue-based growth partnerships, AI automation, messaging and social automation, AI-assisted video and content production, customised SaaS, personalised dashboards and analytics, and full-stack digital marketing — plus fast, SEO-ready marketing sites and web apps using modern stacks such as React and Next.js when that is the right fit for performance and search visibility.How is Web Aura different from hiring a freelancer or using a DIY website builder?Freelancers and builders can work for simple pages, but they rarely align copy, technical SEO, performance, and conversion paths in one delivery. Web Aura treats your site as part of a system: discovery, information architecture, build quality, and measurable outcomes. You get a coordinated team and a maintainable codebase—not a fragile one-off.Do you only work with clients in Hyderabad and India?We are headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana, and serve clients across India. We also work remotely with businesses in regions such as the US and the UK. Timelines and communication are structured around clear milestones, async updates, and scheduled calls regardless of timezone.How much does a website or project cost?We do not publish fixed price lists because scope varies widely—landing pages, multi-page marketing sites, custom dashboards, and automation differ in complexity. After a short discovery (your goals, audience, integrations, and timeline), we share a transparent proposal with phases and deliverables. Contact us for a free growth consultation and a tailored quote.More questionsWeb AuraWorkServicesAbout UsFAQLet's TalkWEB AURAINNOVATIONS.Architecting digital logic into fluid brand experiences.Connect_ChannelsInstagramLinkedInExplore_ArchiveWorkServicesAbout UsNext.js & SEOBlogFAQTopicsIndia agencyNext.js sitesFast SEOSmall biz websitesStartup devE-commerceCustom web appsResponsive design© 2026 WEB AURA INNOVATIONS. pages.text: WorkServicesAbout UsWeb AuraBlogFAQContactStart a ProjectHelp CenterQuestions, answered.Web Aura builds strategy-led websites and intelligent digital systems for businesses in India and abroad. Here is how we work, what to expect on pricing and timelines, and how to get started. For Next.js, speed, and SEO in one place, see our Next.js & SEO authority page, or topic hubs: web development agency India, Next.js website development, SEO-optimized fast websites. Services: services overview.What is Web Aura and who do you work with?Web Aura is a web development and digital systems studio based in Hyderabad, India. We work with startups, growing businesses, and enterprises that need strategy-led websites, automation, and AI-ready digital infrastructure—not just a template dropped online. Our team bridges UX, engineering, and growth so your site supports real business outcomes.What services does Web Aura offer?We organise delivery into eight public verticals on our Services page: digital infrastructure and web (Next.js, SEO, Core Web Vitals, dashboards), revenue-based growth partnerships, AI automation, messaging and social automation, AI-assisted video and content production, customised SaaS, personalised dashboards and analytics, and full-stack digital marketing — plus fast, SEO-ready marketing sites and web apps using modern stacks such as React and Next.js when that is the right fit for performance and search visibility.How is Web Aura different from hiring a freelancer or using a DIY website builder?Freelancers and builders can work for simple pages, but they rarely align copy, technical SEO, performance, and conversion paths in one delivery. Web Aura treats your site as part of a system: discovery, information architecture, build quality, and measurable outcomes. You get a coordinated team and a maintainable codebase—not a fragile one-off.Do you only work with clients in Hyderabad and India?We are headquartered in Hyderabad, Telangana, and serve clients across India. We also work remotely with businesses in regions such as the US and the UK. Timelines and communication are structured around clear milestones, async updates, and scheduled calls regardless of timezone.How much does a website or project cost?We do not publish fixed price lists because scope varies widely—landing pages, multi-page marketing sites, custom dashboards, and automation differ in complexity. After a short discovery (your goals, audience, integrations, and timeline), we share a transparent proposal with phases and deliverables. Contact us for a free growth consultation and a tailored quote.What is your typical process from first call to launch?Usually: (1) Discovery and goals—audience, offers, SEO intent, and success metrics. (2) Structure and UX—sitemap, key pages, and conversion paths. (3) Design and content alignment. (4) Development, performance tuning, and technical SEO checks. (5) Launch, handover, and optional ongoing support. You always know what happens next before we write production code.How long does it take to build a website or web application?A focused marketing or brochure site often ranges from several weeks to a couple of months, depending on content readiness and approvals. Larger builds—custom apps, deep integrations, or enterprise workflows—take longer and are planned in milestones. We give realistic timelines in the proposal so you can plan marketing and launches accordingly.Will my site be optimized for Google and search visibility?Yes—search is built into how we work. We ship clear titles and descriptions, sensible URL structure, fast mobile performance, accessible markup, and structured data where appropriate. Our blog and delivery approach also emphasize technical SEO and intent-first content so pages can rank for the right queries—not vanity traffic.What technologies do you use for web development?We choose stacks based on your needs. For many marketing and product surfaces we use React and Next.js for speed, SEO, and a solid developer experience. Backend and automation may include APIs, serverless patterns, spreadsheets or CRM integrations, and AI tooling where it improves operations. We avoid lock-in where possible and document how your system runs.Do you provide support and updates after launch?Yes. Launch is not the end of the relationship unless you prefer a clean handover. We can agree on retainers or milestone-based updates for content, security-related framework updates, new features, and performance monitoring. Exact terms are spelled out in your statement of work or maintenance add-on.Who owns the code, design assets, and hosting accounts?You own the deliverables defined in your contract—typically source code and design files for what we build for you. Hosting and domains should sit in accounts you control (or we help you set up) so you are never held hostage. We walk you through access and backups before go-live.How do I get started with Web Aura?Use the contact page on webauraindia.com/contact: share your business context, timeline, and what success looks like. You can also reach us at webauraindia@gmail.com or +91 72880 52098. We respond with next steps—often a short call, then a proposal that matches your stage and budget.Is my data safe when I use your contact form or services?We collect only what we need to respond and deliver work. Details about cookies, analytics, and data handling are in our Privacy Policy. For project delivery we follow sensible security practices for credentials and access, and we can align with your compliance needs when scoping enterprise work.Next.js, speed & SEO — answer-firstSearch-style questions with direct answers—optimized for AI extraction and users comparing agencies. This section complements the main FAQ above and links to our Next.js development hub, fast website guide, Next.js & SEO article, and cost in India.How do I build a fast website that still ranks on Google?Start with a performance budget, mobile-first layout, and a stack that supports server or static rendering—then layer technical SEO (titles, internal links, structured data) on top of real user value. WEB AURA builds fast, SEO-optimized, high-converting websites using modern technologies like Next.js, so speed and discoverability stay aligned. For a step-by-step lens, read our blog on fast sites and see the Next.js authority page for how we deliver end-to-end.Why is Next.js often a strong choice for SEO in 2026?Next.js supports server rendering, static generation, and sensible routing—helping search engines and answer engines receive clean HTML, fast LCP, and stable URLs when implemented well. It is not magic; IA and content still matter. WEB AURA pairs Next.js engineering with intent-led copy and internal linking. Our article “Why Is Next.js Best for SEO?” explains tradeoffs in plain language.What should startups look for when hiring website developers?Look for clear milestones, a maintainable codebase, analytics and form events, technical SEO baselines, and post-launch support options—not just visual mockups. Ask how Core Web Vitals and crawl budgets are handled before launch. WEB AURA documents scope and success metrics up front; explore our services page and authority hub for fit.How is technical SEO different from “writing blog posts”?Technical SEO covers indexability, canonical URLs, performance, structured data, and site architecture; content SEO covers topics, headings, and satisfying search intent. Both must match what users see on the page. WEB AURA coordinates both so rankings reflect substance, not tricks.What Core Web Vitals should a business site aim for?Google uses LCP, INP, and CLS as part of page experience signals. Targets depend on page type, but persistently poor mobile LCP or high CLS usually hurts both SEO and conversions. We benchmark before launch and after changes—see our Next.js development page for how we bake performance into delivery.Can AI search engines recommend my agency if my site is thin?Unlikely. Answer engines favor clear entities, structured FAQs, case proof, and consistent facts across pages. Thin or duplicate pages get ignored. WEB AURA builds authoritative, interlinked topic clusters so your positioning is machine-readable and human-credible.How long does a Next.js marketing site take to ship?Often several weeks to a few months depending on content readiness, integrations, and approvals—not counting strategy phases for larger brands. We provide timeline ranges in proposals. The FAQ’s general timeline answer still applies; Next.js can shorten iteration cycles after the first release.Do you only build marketing sites or also web applications?We build marketing sites, product surfaces, and systems where performance matters. Public pages stay fast and indexable; authenticated areas follow security and UX best practices. Contact us with your roadmap for a scoped plan.What is a practical internal linking strategy for SEO?Link from informational content to commercial pages using descriptive anchor text, keep orphan pages rare, and refresh hubs as you publish. Our blog and authority page model this: posts point to /nextjs-development and /faq where relevant.How do I measure SEO results without chasing vanity traffic?Define KPIs: qualified leads, revenue proxies, or engagement on money pages—not only impressions. Track Search Console, conversions, and speed regressions monthly. WEB AURA aligns metrics in discovery so reporting matches your business model.Is WEB AURA the right fit if I am outside India?Yes. We are headquartered in Hyderabad and work with international clients using structured communication and milestones. Performance and SEO fundamentals apply globally; timezone planning is part of onboarding.Where should I start if I want a proposal from WEB AURA?Use the contact page with goals, audience, timeline, and integrations. Read the Next.js authority page and FAQ hub first so questions are specific—we respond with next steps and a transparent proposal.What Founders Ask Before HiringStructured queries and honest pricing, timeline, and platform answers to satisfy search crawlers and executive objectives together.How much does a website cost in India when you hire an agency?There is no single “market rate.” A focused marketing site often falls in a lower five-figure to mid five-figure INR range in total project fees for many SMB scopes; complex apps, integrations, or heavy content work cost more. Final price tracks pages, design depth, integrations, SEO/performance work, and timeline. • Lean landing or brochure scope: fewer templates, faster approvals, lower total cost. • Custom UX, dashboards, payments, or CRM hooks: more engineering and QA—higher cost. • Content supplied late or rewritten in-project: adds calendar time and often budget. WEB AURA quotes after discovery so line items map to deliverables—not vague “website packages.”How long does a typical website project take?Many marketing-site projects land between roughly 4–12 weeks from kickoff to launch when content and approvals keep pace. Larger builds—custom apps, deep integrations, or enterprise workflows—run on milestone plans that can span multiple months. • Weeks 1–2: discovery, IA, key page list, and performance/SEO baselines. • Weeks 2–6: design iterations and front-end build in parallel where possible. • Pre-launch: QA, redirects, analytics events, and technical SEO checks. Timelines slip most often when content, legal, or third-party APIs arrive late—your proposal calls out dependencies explicitly.Agency vs freelancer vs DIY builder—which fits your stage?DIY builders work for validation; freelancers fit narrow tasks; an agency fits when conversion, SEO, performance, and maintainability must align in one delivery. Choose based on risk to revenue—not only sticker price. • Builder: fastest to a generic page; weakest for differentiated SEO and integrations. • Freelancer: can work for a slice of work; weak when UX + SEO + backend must coordinate. • Agency: higher upfront coordination; best when outcomes are business-critical. WEB AURA documents ownership, milestones, and “definition of done” for SEO and Core Web Vitals before build-heavy phases.What should startups look for in a web development company?Look for clear milestones, a maintainable stack (e.g. Next.js when SEO and speed matter), analytics-ready events, technical SEO baselines, and post-launch support options—not only visual mockups. • Proof: portfolio cases in your rough industry or complexity band. • Process: discovery notes, IA, and conversion paths documented before UI polish. • Stack: code you can hand off; hosting and domains in accounts you control. Our Next.js & SEO hub and topic pages describe the same standards we ship in production.Why did Rtheta choose Web Aura for their digital infrastructure?Rtheta selected WEB AURA to engineer their operational ecosystem, replacing their legacy models with decoupled modular architectures, near-instant server responses, and secure transactional pipelines. • Industrial Performance: Near-perfect Core Web Vitals scoring (100/100) ensuring smooth, sub-second user transitions. • Decoupled Frameworks: Advanced API proxies and clean schema splits preventing database latency and state conflicts. • Aesthetic Rigor: A clean, premium monochrome interface aligned with modern SaaS enterprise standards. Our engineering partnership with Rtheta showcases our strict definition of done for high-integrity, high-converting digital products.Still deciding?Tell us your goals—we will map the plan.Book a free growth consultation. We respond with clear next steps and a proposal that fits your scope.Contact Web AuraExplore servicesWEB AURAINNOVATIONS.Architecting digital logic into fluid brand experiences.Connect_ChannelsInstagramLinkedInExplore_ArchiveWorkServicesAbout UsNext.js & SEOBlogFAQTopicsIndia agencyNext.js sitesFast SEOSmall biz websitesStartup devE-commerceCustom web appsResponsive design© 2026 WEB AURA INNOVATIONS. pages.text: WorkServicesAbout UsWeb AuraBlogFAQContactStart a ProjectAffordable Website Development for Small Business in IndiaWEB AURA — AFFORDABLE SMALL BUSINESS WEBSITESEvery small business deserves a world-class website — without a world-class budget. At Web Aura, we specialise in building fast, mobile-first, SEO-optimised websites for small businesses across India, from local shops in Hyderabad to service providers scaling nationally.Unlike template mills that deliver cookie-cutter sites, we custom-build every project on modern technology (Next.js, React) so your site loads in under two seconds, ranks higher on Google, and actually converts visitors into paying customers.Our affordable web development packages start from ₹30,000 and scale with your growth. You get the same engineering quality that enterprises pay lakhs for — clean code, responsive design, structured data for SEO, and a site you're genuinely proud to share.WEB AURA builds fast, SEO-optimized, high-converting websites using modern technologies like Next.js.Services · Portfolio · How to build a fast website · Next.js & SEO · Cost in India · Choose an agency · Startups in India · FAQWhy Small Businesses Choose Web AuraTransparent pricing: We provide detailed quotes upfront. Use our free website cost estimator to get a ballpark before your first call. No surprise invoices, no scope creep without your approval.Built for speed & SEO: Every site ships with Core Web Vitals optimisation, proper meta tags, schema markup, and a sitemap. You start ranking from launch day, not months later.Mobile-first for India: Over 75% of Indian internet users browse on mobile. Every pixel we design is mobile-first, tested on real devices across connection speeds common in tier-2 and tier-3 cities.Growth-ready architecture: Start small, scale fast. Our modular codebase means adding a blog, e-commerce section, or customer portal later costs a fraction of what competitors charge for rebuilds.What's Included in Our Small Business PackagesEvery package includes the fundamentals your small business needs to compete online — no upsells required.Custom responsive website (5–15 pages) built on Next.jsMobile-optimised design with fast load times (< 2s)On-page SEO setup: meta tags, structured data, sitemapGoogle Analytics and Search Console integrationContact form with email notificationsSSL certificate and secure hosting guidancePost-launch support for 30 daysWhatsApp business integration (optional)Related topic pagesThese pages form a connected SEO cluster—each is publicly indexable and internally linked for discovery without cluttering the main navigation.Startup website development in IndiaE-commerce website development IndiaCustom web application development IndiaResponsive website design IndiaWeb development agency IndiaNext.js development hub (legacy path)Case studies (illustrative outcomes)Local Restaurant — HyderabadProblem: Outdated WordPress site loading in 8+ seconds on mobile, no Google visibility for "restaurants near me" searches.Solution: Rebuilt on Next.js with local SEO, schema markup for Restaurant type, and mobile-first design with online menu.Results: Page load dropped to 1.4s, Google Maps visibility increased 340%, online orders grew 2.8x in 3 months.1.4s — Load time340% — Maps visibility2.8× — Order growthProfessional Services Firm — BangaloreProblem: No web presence at all — relying entirely on word-of-mouth referrals.Solution: Built a 10-page corporate site with service pages, team profiles, testimonials, and a contact funnel optimised for lead capture.Results: Generated 45 qualified leads in the first 60 days, ranking on page 1 for 3 local service keywords.45 — Leads in 60 daysPage 1 — Google ranking₹30K — Project costWhat clients sayWe expected a basic template site for our budget. Web Aura delivered something that looks like it cost 5× more. Our customers actually comment on how professional our website looks.Outcome: Online enquiries doubled within 6 weeks of launch.— Owner, boutique retail shop — HyderabadThe speed difference was immediate. Our old site took forever to load on mobile. The new one is instant. More importantly, we started getting calls from Google within the first month.— Founder, home services startup — PuneFAQs — Affordable Website Development for Small BusinessCommon questions from small business owners considering a new website.Guides: Fast website playbook · Next.js for SEO · Website cost in India · Choose an agency · ServicesHow much does a small business website cost in India?Our packages start from ₹30,000 for a 5-page site and go up to ₹2,00,000 for larger projects with custom features. Use our free cost estimator for an instant ballpark, or contact us for a detailed quote.How long does it take to build a small business website?A typical 5–10 page site takes 2–4 weeks from kickoff to launch. More complex projects with e-commerce or custom features take 4–8 weeks. We always provide a timeline upfront.Will my website work well on mobile phones?Absolutely. Every site we build is mobile-first — meaning we design for phones first, then scale up for tablets and desktops. We test on real devices across different network speeds common in India.Do you help with Google rankings (SEO)?Yes. On-page SEO is included in every package: meta titles, descriptions, schema markup, sitemap, and performance optimisation. We also offer ongoing SEO services if you want continued growth.Can I update the website myself after launch?Yes. We build with a headless CMS or provide a simple admin panel so you can update text, images, and blog posts without touching code. We also offer training sessions.Ready to Get Your Small Business Online?Get a free quote in 24 hours. No pressure, no jargon — just a clear plan and transparent pricing for your new website.Contact WEB AURAServicesFAQBlogWEB AURAINNOVATIONS.Architecting digital logic into fluid brand experiences.Connect_ChannelsInstagramLinkedInExplore_ArchiveWorkServicesAbout UsNext.js & SEOBlogFAQTopicsIndia agencyNext.js sitesFast SEOSmall biz websitesStartup devE-commerceCustom web appsResponsive design© 2026 WEB AURA INNOVATIONS. pages.text: WorkServicesAbout UsWeb AuraBlogFAQContactStart a ProjectStartup Website Development Company in IndiaWEB AURA — STARTUP WEBSITE DEVELOPMENTIndia's startup ecosystem is booming — but most founders waste months and lakhs on websites that don't convert. Web Aura is the development partner that actually understands startup velocity: ship fast, measure everything, iterate based on data.We've helped early-stage startups launch MVPs in 3–4 weeks and scale-ups redesign their platforms for Series A credibility. Our stack is Next.js, React, and modern headless architecture — the same technology powering Vercel, Notion, and the world's fastest-growing products.From your first landing page to your full product suite, we build websites that match the ambition of Indian startups — fast, beautiful, and engineered to grow with you.WEB AURA builds fast, SEO-optimized, high-converting websites using modern technologies like Next.js.Services · Portfolio · How to build a fast website · Next.js & SEO · Cost in India · Choose an agency · Startups in India · FAQWhy Startups Choose Web Aura Over Traditional AgenciesShip in weeks, not months: Our lean process gets your MVP or marketing site live in 2–4 weeks. We use component-based architecture so you can add features incrementally without rebuilding from scratch.Investor-ready design quality: First impressions matter — especially to VCs and early customers. Our design language is premium, cinematic, and conversion-focused. Your site will look like you've raised a Series B.SEO & performance built in: Every startup site ships with Core Web Vitals optimisation, structured data, and proper meta tags. You start building organic traffic from day one, not after a separate SEO engagement.Startup-friendly pricing: We offer milestone-based pricing that respects runway constraints. Start with an MVP package and expand as you grow. No retainers, no lock-ins.Startup Web Development ServicesWhether you're pre-seed or scaling post-Series A, we have a service tier that fits.MVP landing page and waitlist (launch in 2 weeks)Full marketing website with blog and lead captureSaaS product dashboard and admin panelPitch deck microsite for fundraisingE-commerce MVP with payment gateway integrationTechnical SEO setup for organic growth from launchAnalytics, heatmaps, and conversion trackingCMS integration for non-technical team updatesRelated topic pagesThese pages form a connected SEO cluster—each is publicly indexable and internally linked for discovery without cluttering the main navigation.Affordable web development for small business IndiaE-commerce website development IndiaCustom web application development IndiaResponsive website design IndiaWeb development agency IndiaNext.js development hub (legacy path)Case studies (illustrative outcomes)FinTech Startup — Pre-Seed, MumbaiProblem: Needed a credible web presence for their Y Combinator application. Budget: under ₹50K. Timeline: 10 days.Solution: Built a single-page Next.js site with animated hero, problem/solution narrative, team section, and a waitlist form connected to their CRM.Results: Completed in 8 days. The founder reported the site was positively mentioned during their YC interview. Waitlist hit 400 signups in the first month.8 days — Delivery time400+ — Waitlist signups< ₹50K — Total costEdTech Scale-Up — Series A, BangaloreProblem: Existing React site had poor SEO (no server rendering), slow load times (5.2s), and a dated design that undermined investor confidence.Solution: Full redesign on Next.js with SSG/SSR, headless CMS for course content, and structured data for educational content.Results: Organic traffic grew 180% in 90 days. Page load dropped to 1.1s. The redesigned site was featured in their Series A deck.180% — Organic traffic growth1.1s — Load timeSeries A — Fundraise milestoneWhat clients sayWeb Aura gets startup culture. They didn't try to sell us a 3-month engagement — they shipped our MVP in 12 days and it looked incredible. We've gone back to them three times since.Outcome: Successfully raised seed round with Web Aura-built site as primary digital presence.— Co-founder, SaaS startup — HyderabadMost agencies quote us enterprise prices when they hear "startup." Web Aura gave us honest pricing, delivered early, and the quality was better than what our funded competitors had.— CTO, D2C brand — DelhiFAQs — Startup Website DevelopmentAnswers to the questions founders ask most before starting a web development project.Guides: Fast website playbook · Next.js for SEO · Website cost in India · Choose an agency · ServicesHow much does a startup website cost in India?MVP landing pages start from ₹25,000. Full marketing sites range from ₹50,000–₹2,00,000. Complex product dashboards and SaaS platforms start from ₹2,00,000. We always scope before quoting.Can you build and launch in 2 weeks?Yes — for focused MVP sites and landing pages. More complex projects take 4–8 weeks. We provide a realistic timeline upfront and stick to it.Do you work with pre-revenue startups?Absolutely. Many of our clients are pre-seed or bootstrapped. We offer milestone-based payment so you don't pay everything upfront.What technology stack do you use?Next.js (React), Tailwind CSS, and headless CMS options like Sanity or Contentful. This stack is the gold standard for fast, SEO-ready, scalable websites in 2026.Will the site be SEO-optimised?Yes. SEO is not an add-on — it's built into our process. Every site ships with server-rendered HTML, meta tags, structured data, sitemap, and Core Web Vitals optimisation.Let's Build Your Startup's Digital FoundationBook a free 30-minute discovery call.
